name: clipper-cli
description: Plugin-first CLI for collecting web content with request and client fallback, then publishing to Markdown-based note systems.
author: Rogee

scripts.build: node -e "import('node:fs').then(({ rmSync }) => rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter clipper-plugin-weixin build && pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:task3: pnpm --filter clipper-plugin-weixin build && pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.task3.config.ts
